samples.gvd:
module signal_generator
(
    input clk,
    input rst_n,
    output reg [4:0] wave
);
    reg state;
    always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
        if (!rst_n) begin
            state <= 1'b0;
            wave <= 5'b0;
        end
        else begin
            case (state)
                1'b0: begin
                    if (wave == 5'd31) begin
                        state <= 1'b1;
                    end
                    else begin
                        wave <= wave + 1;
                    end
                end
                1'b1: begin
                    if (wave == 5'd0) begin
                        state <= 1'b0;
                    end
                    else begin
                        wave <= wave - 1;
                    end
                end
            endcase
        end
    end
endmodule
samples.xml_description:
<module id="signal_generator">
    <description>Triangle Wave signal generator.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <output id="wave" width_description="[4:0]">Output waveform signal.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <param id="state">State register for controlling the waveform generation.</param>
        <param id="wave">Waveform register representing the generated signal.</param>
    </param_description>
    <implementation>Reset and increment/decrement the waveform to generate a triangle wave.</implementation>
</module>
